Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class Profile

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Profile
public class Profile extends Metadata

Java class for Profile complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Profile">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="applicationVisibilities" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileApplicationVisibility" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="categoryGroupVisibilities" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileCategoryGroupVisibility" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="classAccesses" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileApexClassAccess" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="custom" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customMetadataTypeAccesses" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileCustomMetadataTypeAccess" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customPermissions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileCustomPermissions" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customSettingAccesses" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileCustomSettingAccess" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="externalDataSourceAccesses" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileExternalDataSourceAccess" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldPermissions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileFieldLevelSecurity" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="flowAccesses" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileFlowAccess" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="layoutAssignments" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileLayoutAssignment" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginFlows" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}LoginFlow" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginHours" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileLoginHours" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginIpRanges" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileLoginIpRange" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="objectPermissions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileObjectPermissions" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pageAccesses" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileApexPageAccess" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="profileActionOverrides" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileActionOverride" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordTypeVisibilities" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileRecordTypeVisibility" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="tabVisibilities" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileTabVisibility" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userLicense" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userPermissions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileUserPermission" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getApplicationVisibilities

      public List<ProfileApplicationVisibility> getApplicationVisibilities()
      Gets the value of the applicationVisibilities property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the applicationVisibilities property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getApplicationVisibilities().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ProfileApplicationVisibility

      Returns:
      The value of the applicationVisibilities property.

    • getCategoryGroupVisibilities

      public List<ProfileCategoryGroupVisibility> getCategoryGroupVisibilities()
      Gets the value of the categoryGroupVisibilities property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the categoryGroupVisibilities property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCategoryGroupVisibilities().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ProfileCategoryGroupVisibility

      Returns:
      The value of the categoryGroupVisibilities property.

    • getClassAccesses

      public List<ProfileApexClassAccess> getClassAccesses()
      Gets the value of the classAccesses property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the classAccesses property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getClassAccesses().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ProfileApexClassAccess

      Returns:
      The value of the classAccesses property.
